error_signature: auth plugin not visible after installation
title: Auth plugin not visible after installation
symptom: After attempting to install the WeWeb auth plugin, it appears to be installed but is not listed among the installed plugins. Consequently, the auth actions are inaccessible in workflows.
applies_when: Another auth plugin is already installed
not_this_if: No other auth plugins are installed
root_cause: WeWeb restricts the installation of multiple auth plugins because they manage the same global information regarding the connected user. If another auth plugin is already installed, the new one cannot be accessed.
fix_steps: Identify the currently installed auth plugin (e.g., Xano Auth)
Remove the existing auth plugin from the plugins list
Re-attempt the installation of the WeWeb auth plugin
agent_instruction: Remove the existing auth plugin before installing the WeWeb auth plugin.
